title: CHILD WELFARE SERVICES - 211info
text: COOS BAY/NORTH BEND CHILD WELFARE AND SELF-SUFFICIENCY CHILD WELFARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help in keeping families united. Finds temporary and permanent homes for kids who need them, including foster and adoptive homes. The program also teaches people how to become resource parents. 1431 Airport Lane North Bend, OR 97459 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed on major holidays (541) 756-5500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 756-5500 Abuse Reporting Line (855) 503-7233 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Coos County Services: Adoption Services Family Preservation Programs Foster Home Placement Foster Parent/Family Recruitment Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD ABUSE REPORTING MUTUAL SUPPORT - FOSTER, ADOPT, AND KINSHIP PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - EMPLOYMENT RELATED DAYCARE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SNAP PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SUMMER EBT PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - TEMPORARY ASSISTANCE FOR NEEDY FAMILIES TEMPORARY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - TEMPORARY ASSISTANCE TO DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SURVIVORS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
